methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $36M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 6 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Biotech & Health. Range: $100M - $3.3B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Biotech & Health P/S median is 5.8x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health

private.name: Zeta Surgical
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series A), post-money $100M

data.narrative:
Living Carbon, a Series A biotech company, is valued here using a comparable universe of 11 peers across the Biotech & Health sector—3 public (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L) and 8 private firms including Eikon Therapeutics, Neko Health, and Asimov.

Two valuation methods are applicable. Stage-progression, using the company's $36M total raised as a proxy for current value and applying a 2.0x step-up multiplier typical of Series A advancement, implies a valuation of $72M. Peer-median analysis across 6 same-sector, same/adjacent-stage comparables yields a median valuation of $805M, with a range spanning $100M to $3.3B. Public-comp anchoring via price-to-sales (median 5.8x across the sector) cannot be applied due to the absence of disclosed revenue for the target.

The triangulated analysis across these two applicable methods supports a valuation range of $61M to $926M, with a median of $438M. The wide dispersion reflects substantial uncertainty around whether Living Carbon trades closer to other Series A-stage entrants or commands Series B valuations comparable to peers like Asimov ($800M) and New Limit ($810M). Resolution depends critically on the company's capital efficiency, IP position, and clinical/commercial validation trajectory relative to the peer set.
